creator: freebsd@troback.com
text:
Upgrade to version 3.0.4!


diff -ruN gramps_org/Makefile gramps/Makefile
--- gramps_org/Makefile	2008-07-14 14:57:56.000000000 +0000
+++ gramps/Makefile	2008-12-10 11:41:48.000000000 +0000
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/science/gramps/Makefile,v 1.34 2008/07/14 14:57:56 tabthorpe Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	gramps
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
 CATEGORIES=	science gnome python
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/_bsddb.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-bsddb \
 		${PYTHON_LIBDIR}/site-packages/_xmlplus/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-xml
 
-USE_BDB=	42+
+USE_BDB=	43
 USE_XLIB=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
diff -ruN gramps_org/distinfo gramps/distinfo
--- gramps_org/distinfo	2008-07-08 18:29:58.000000000 +0000
+++ gramps/distinfo	2008-12-09 15:07:53.000000000 +0000

-SIZE (gramps-3.0.1.tar.gz) = 5932971
+MD5 (gramps-3.0.4.tar.gz) = 7d27020f391ba333b8a9bd490e5bf56e
+SHA256 (gramps-3.0.4.tar.gz) = cca1262bb4e15fd018342c49bbe07a1cac96b1307bffdff10c34f3c1518fd792
+SIZE (gramps-3.0.4.tar.gz) = 5830725
